policiesPage.title: Booking policies
policiesPage.subtitle: Configure cancellation rules, no-show penalties, and schedule visibility
policiesPage.visibleDaysDesc: How many upcoming days clients can see on the /schedule page
policiesPage.visibleDaysExplain: Clients will see today's classes and the next {days} days.
policiesPage.cancellationDesc: Minimum time before class to cancel without losing credit
policiesPage.windowExplainNoLimit: Clients can cancel at any time and always get their credit back.
policiesPage.windowExplain: If a client cancels with less than {hours} hours notice, they will lose the credit used for the booking.
policiesPage.noShowDesc: What happens when a client books but doesn't attend class
policiesPage.enableNoShowDesc: When enabled, no-shows are queued for review before penalties apply
policiesPage.loseCreditDesc: The credit used to book is not refunded. Only applies to credit packages.
policiesPage.chargeFeeDesc: Records an additional fee, configurable per membership type.
policiesPage.feeLabelDefaultHelp: Applies to all members unless you set a different amount for unlimited memberships.
policiesPage.differentUnlimitedFeeDesc: Useful when you want a higher fee for members who don't forfeit a credit.
policiesPage.feeRequired: Set an amount before enabling the fee
policiesPage.graceDesc: Penalties queue for review and auto-confirm after this time. At 0h they apply on the next cron tick.
policiesPage.graceExplainImmediate: Penalties auto-confirm as soon as the cron processes them.
policiesPage.graceExplain: Penalties auto-confirm {hours}h after creation unless an admin resolves them first.
policiesPage.hideCoachDesc: Hides the coach's name and photo from the schedule, booking flow, reminders and emails. The coach is revealed in history once the class has ended.
policiesPage.hideCoachToggle: Hide coach from clients until the class ends
policiesPage.hideCoachToggleDesc: Useful to remove bias from booking decisions. The /instructors directory stays public.
policiesPage.modeRollingDesc: A fixed number of days from today is always visible.
policiesPage.modeWeeklyDesc: A new week is released at a fixed day and time each week.
policiesPage.weeklyExplain: Every {day} at {hour}:00, the schedule extends by one week. Clients can always see the current week plus {weeks, plural, one {# additional week} other {# additional weeks}}.

noShowsPage.title: No-show review
noShowsPage.subtitle: Confirm, waive, or revert penalties before they apply.

classDetail.confirmCancelSingle: Cancel this class? Enrolled students will be notified and their credits refunded.

admin.scheduleSubtitle: Weekly view — click on class for details, click on empty cell to create

admin.coachEmailOptional: Email is optional. If provided, an invitation to access the instructor portal will be sent.
admin.includesOnDemandHint: Members on this subscription can also stream the on-demand library.
admin.waitlistAppearsWhen: Waitlists appear when a class reaches its maximum capacity
admin.noWaiverDesc: Create a liability agreement for your clients to sign before their first class.
admin.htmlHint: You can use HTML. Available variables:
admin.waiverPlaceholder: Write or paste your waiver content here...
admin.publishExistingSignatures: What happens with the {count} clients who already signed?
admin.keepSignaturesDesc: Recommended for minor changes. Only new clients sign the new version.
admin.requestResignDesc: Existing clients will receive a reminder to sign again.
admin.publishVisible: Once published, the waiver will be visible to all your clients.
admin.onBookingDesc: Shows the waiver right after booking a class
admin.onAppOpenDesc: Only if they have a future booking and have not signed
admin.emailAfterBookingDesc: If they did not sign after booking, a reminder email is sent
admin.reminder1hBeforeDesc: Reminder email if they still have not signed
admin.blockCheckinDesc: The admin will see a warning in the roster and can send the link to the client's phone
admin.createWaiverFirst: Create a waiver first to configure it
admin.tapToBlockUnblock: Tap a spot to block or unblock it
admin.activateBlockingMode: Activate blocking mode to select spots on the map
admin.genericBlockingDesc: Block generic spots to reduce available capacity
admin.blockingNotesPlaceholder: E.g.: Spot 5 reserved for special guest Maria Garcia. Spot 8 out of service for maintenance...
admin.cancelBookingDesc: You're about to cancel {name}'s booking for this class. This frees up their spot.
admin.refundCreditHint: When on, the credit is returned ignoring the cancellation policy. When off, the credit is forfeited.
admin.moveBookingDesc: Pick the class to move {name} to. Their current spot is freed and they're notified by email.
admin.notifyEmailOnBookingHint: Get an email whenever a client books a class. Applies only to your account.
admin.spotHasBooking: That spot has an active booking
admin.atRiskDescription: Members with prior activity who haven't attended in over 14 days
admin.studiosAndRoomsDesc: Manage your studios, locations and rooms
admin.createFirstStudioDesc: Create your first studio to get started
admin.deactivateStudioConfirm: Deactivate this studio? It will stop appearing on the schedule and selectors, but its data and classes are kept.
admin.newCityDesc: This is used to organize studios by location. Usually configured only once.
admin.editRoomDesc: Modify the details and layout of the room
admin.newRoomDesc: Configure the room and design the spot distribution
admin.layoutInstructions: Click on the cells to place spots and the instructor position. The instructor spot cannot be booked.
admin.noLayoutDesc: No visual distribution. Clients book a spot without selecting a position.
admin.productPreOrderEnabledDesc: Let clients order smoothies or other products when booking a class at this studio.
admin.saveErrorDesc: Could not save changes. Verify that you have admin permissions.
admin.homeHeadlineDesc: Appears below the "Hi, name" on your members' home.
admin.landingPageDesc: If you have your own website, put it here. The navbar logo will redirect to that URL. Leave empty to use the built-in landing.
admin.logoHint: PNG, SVG or JPG. Transparent background recommended.
admin.appIconHint: Square PNG, minimum 512x512px. Appears when installing as app.
admin.coachIconHint: Monochrome SVG. Used for the instructor spot in the class map. Color is applied automatically.
admin.classMapPreview: This is how it will look in the class map
admin.discoverClasses: Discover our classes, book your spot and transform your routine.
admin.clickToChangeColor: Click on the color to change it
admin.colorsAutoAdjust: Background, text, border and surface colors are automatically adjusted.
admin.darkSectionsPreview: This is how dark sections look
admin.landingBgHint: Dark sections of your landing page
admin.selectClassRoster: Select a class to view the roster
admin.shopifyDesc: Show your Shopify products in the shop. They sync automatically and tapping a product opens it in your Shopify store to check out.
admin.shopifyDisconnectConfirm: Disconnect Shopify? Your shop will go back to showing products created here.
admin.shopifyActiveBanner: Your shop is showing Shopify products. Changes in Shopify appear automatically.
admin.shopifyPausedBanner: Connection paused — your shop is showing products created here.
admin.shopifyToggleHint: Turn off to temporarily show your own products instead.
admin.shopifyTokenKeepPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current token
admin.shopifyTokenHint: In Shopify: Settings → Apps and sales channels → Develop apps → create an app → Storefront API, enable read access to products, and copy the Storefront access token.
admin.shopifyPosDesc: Connect your Shopify app (Dev Dashboard) to sell your physical-store products at the POS: it shows real sizes and stock, and on checkout it creates the order in Shopify (decrementing inventory).
admin.shopifyPosDisconnectConfirm: Disconnect the Admin API? The POS will stop showing Shopify inventory and creating orders.
admin.shopifyPosDomainHint: Your store's .myshopify.com domain (e.g. your-store.myshopify.com). The Admin API uses this even if your public shop uses a custom domain.
admin.shopifyAdminTokenHint: In the Shopify Dev Dashboard: create an app, enable the Admin API scopes (read_products, read_inventory, write_inventory, read_locations, write_orders, read_orders, write_merchant_managed_fulfillment_orders) and install it on THIS store. Then copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the app's Settings.
admin.shopifyPosLocationHint: The POS reads and decrements this location's inventory (not the online channel's).
admin.noCategoriesCreateOne: No categories. Create one to start adding products.
admin.categoriesGroupProducts: Categories group products in the store.
admin.addNewProductToStore: Add a new product to your store
admin.priceFreeHint: Set it to 0 to offer it for free.
admin.maxPerOrderHint: How many units a client can order. Empty = 10 by default.
admin.externalLinkHint: If filled, the client will be redirected to this link instead of buying on the platform.
admin.clientsCanBuy: Clients can see and purchase this product
admin.onlySellFromStudio: Can only be sold from the studio
admin.preOrderForBookingsDesc: Shown in the booking flow so clients can pick it up after class.
admin.availableInStudiosAllHint: No selection: available at every studio.
admin.packagesSubtitle: Introductory offers, credit packages and recurring subscriptions
admin.minCommitmentHint: The member can't end the subscription before this many months — a cancellation takes effect when the commitment ends. Empty = no commitment.
admin.deletePackageConfirm: Delete "{name}"? If anyone has already purchased it, it will be archived instead so their history is preserved.
admin.packageArchived: Package archived (it had existing purchases, so it was hidden instead of removed).
admin.editPackageDesc: Update prices, validity, disciplines and visibility.
admin.newPackageDesc: Define type, price and usage rules. No disciplines selected = all.
admin.typeCannotChange: Type cannot be changed when editing.
admin.perDisciplineHint: Assign independent credits to each discipline. Leave at 0 for those that don't apply.
admin.noSelectionAllDisciplines: No selection = all disciplines. Check only if you want to restrict.
admin.validDaysMin1: Valid days must be at least 1.
admin.addCreditsToOneDiscipline: Add credits to at least one discipline.
admin.creditsNumberOrUnlimited: Enter a number of credits or mark as unlimited.
admin.creditsValidNumber: Credits must be a valid number.
admin.searchTransactions: Search by name, amount or method...
admin.retentionDescription: Percentage of members still active (attended in the last 30 days), grouped by tenure
admin.retentionWarning: Some cohorts are below 60% retention. A healthy benchmark is >60% at 90 days.
admin.noActiveSubscriptionsDesc: When a member subscribes to a recurring plan, it will appear here
admin.pauseExtendsCommitment: If the plan has a minimum commitment, it's extended by these days.

admin.newDisciplineDesc: Define a new class type for the studio

legal.privacyWhoWeAreDesc: {company}, registered in Spain, contact email hola@mgic.app, is the entity responsible for processing your personal data through this platform.
legal.privacyDataCollectedDesc: We collect the following information when you create an account or use our services:
legal.privacyDataPayment: Payment information (processed by Stripe, we do not store card data)
legal.privacyDataDevice: Technical browsing data (IP address, device type, browser language)
legal.privacyLegalBasisDesc: We process your data based on:
legal.privacyLegalBasisContract: Contract performance: to manage your account, bookings, payments and subscriptions.
legal.privacyLegalBasisConsent: Consent: for sending push notifications and optional marketing communications.
legal.privacyLegalBasisLegitimate: Legitimate interest: to improve the platform, prevent fraud and ensure service security.
legal.privacyLegalBasisLegal: Legal obligation: to comply with applicable tax and legal obligations.
legal.privacyPurposeBookings: Manage your class bookings and packages
legal.privacyPurposeComms: Send you confirmations, reminders and studio notifications
legal.privacyPurposeImprove: Improve the platform experience and develop new features
legal.privacyPurposeSupport: Respond to your inquiries and provide technical support
legal.privacySharingDesc: When you register at a studio through the platform, your profile data (name, email, phone, booking and attendance history) is shared with that studio so they can manage your relationship as a client: contact you, manage your bookings, handle check-in and provide a personalized service. Each studio only has access to the data of its own clients.
legal.privacySharingProvidersDesc: We share data with the following service providers who act as data processors under our instructions:
legal.privacySharingSupabase: Supabase Inc. (USA) — file and image storage
legal.privacySharingNoSell: We do not sell or transfer your personal information to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacyTransfersDesc: Some of our service providers (Stripe, Resend, Supabase) are located in the United States. These transfers are carried out under the safeguards established by the GDPR, including Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission and/or the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
legal.privacyRetentionDesc: We retain your personal data for as long as you maintain an active account on the platform. Once you request account deletion, your data will be deleted or anonymized within a maximum of 30 days, unless there is a legal obligation to retain it (e.g., tax data for the legally established period).
legal.privacyCookiesDesc: We use only essential cookies to keep your session active, remember your language preferences and ensure the platform functions properly. We do not use advertising tracking cookies or third-party analytics.
legal.privacyRightsDesc: Under the GDPR and LOPDGDD, you have the right to:
legal.privacyRightsAccess: Access: request a copy of your personal data.
legal.privacyRightsRectify: Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
legal.privacyRightsDelete: Erasure: request the deletion of your data.
legal.privacyRightsPortability: Portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
legal.privacyRightsObject: Object: object to the processing of your data for reasons related to your particular situation.
legal.privacyRightsRestrict: Restriction: request the restriction of processing in certain circumstances.
legal.privacyRightsExercise: You can exercise these rights by contacting us at hola@mgic.app or from the profile section of the platform.
legal.privacyAuthorityDesc: If you consider that the processing of your data does not comply with regulations, you may file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
legal.privacyContactDesc: For any privacy inquiries, contact {company} at hola@mgic.app.
legal.termsAcceptanceDesc: By creating an account or using the services operated by {company}, you accept these terms of service in full. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
legal.termsServiceDesc: {company} provides a technology platform that enables fitness, wellness and sports studios to manage bookings, packages, subscriptions and payments. The content, quality and availability of classes is the sole responsibility of each studio.
legal.termsAccountDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and the confidentiality of your access credentials. You must not share your account with third parties. You must provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
legal.termsBookingsDesc: When booking a class, you accept the following conditions:
legal.termsBookingsCancel: You can cancel your booking up to 12 hours before the class to recover your credit.
legal.termsBookingsCredits: Cancellations outside the allowed window do not generate credit refunds.
legal.termsBookingsNoShow: No-show without prior cancellation may result in the loss of the credit used.
legal.termsPaymentsDesc: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. Prices are displayed in the currency configured by the studio. Subscriptions renew automatically according to the contracted period. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your profile; the cancellation will take effect at the end of the current period.
legal.termsWithdrawalDesc: In accordance with European regulations, you have 14 calendar days from the date of purchase to exercise your right of withdrawal, unless you have consumed the service (attended a class or used credits), in which case it is understood that you have expressly waived this right.
legal.termsConductDesc: You agree to use the platform respectfully and in accordance with the law. Any fraudulent, abusive use or interference with the normal operation of the service is prohibited. The studio and {company} reserve the right to suspend or cancel accounts that violate these rules.
legal.termsIntellectualDesc: All elements of the platform (code, design, trademarks, logos) are the property of {company} or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws. No usage rights are granted beyond access to the service.
legal.termsLiabilityDesc: {company} acts as a technology provider and is not responsible for activities carried out at studios. Participants attend classes at their own risk and should inform the instructor about relevant medical conditions. {company} is not liable for indirect damages, loss of profits or service interruptions due to causes beyond its control.
legal.termsChangesDesc: We may modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified by email at least 15 days in advance. Continued use of the service after the modifications take effect implies acceptance.
legal.termsLawDesc: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute that cannot be resolved amicably, both parties submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Madrid, unless consumer protection regulations establish a different venue.
legal.termsContactDesc: For inquiries about these terms, contact {company} at hola@mgic.app.
legal.cookieMessage: We use essential cookies to keep the platform running properly and remember your preferences.

roles.frontDeskDescription: Can manage check-in, schedule, clients and point of sale. Cannot access finance, settings or team management.

classDetail.waitlistDesc: A credit was deducted. If a spot opens up, you'll be automatically enrolled and notified. If not, your credit will be refunded.

classDetail.waitlistCreditDesc: A credit will be deducted when joining. If a spot opens, you'll be automatically enrolled. If you don't get in, your credit will be refunded.
classDetail.waitlistNeedsCredits: Joining the waitlist uses 1 credit and you have none. Tap to see the packages.
classDetail.justNotifyMe: Just notify me if a spot opens up

classDetail.noCommitment: No commitment — we'll only notify you if there's a spot.

discounts.title: Discount Codes

discounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this code?
discounts.createDescription: Create a new discount code. It will sync automatically with Stripe.
discounts.packageRestrictionsHint: Leave empty to apply to all packages

gifts.title: Gifted Packages
gifts.emptyDescription: Gifted packages appear here when an admin gifts classes or packages to clients.
gifts.auditNoticeDescription: All gifted packages are logged with the admin who granted them, the reason, and the date. This log helps control usage and prevent fraud.

embed.title: Find a class
embed.timezoneHint: All dates and times are shown in the location's time zone.

admin.title: Embed schedule
admin.subtitle: Copy this code and paste it on your website to show your class schedule to visitors. Updates automatically with your calendar.
admin.scriptDesc: Works anywhere: WordPress, Wix, Webflow, Squarespace, or plain HTML. Auto-resizes to fit the content.
admin.iframeDesc: If your platform doesn't allow third-party scripts, you can use a fixed-height iframe instead.
admin.previewDesc: This is how the widget will look on your site.
admin.bulletAutoResize: Automatic height resizing based on content
admin.bulletNoCookies: No third-party cookies — compatible with all browsers
admin.bulletAnyDomain: Works on any domain without additional setup

meta.title: Mgic Studio — The all-in-one platform for boutique fitness studios
meta.description: Replace 10 tools with one. Mgic is the modern studio management platform that handles scheduling, payments, member engagement, AI insights, and community — so you can focus on what you love.
meta.ogDescription: Replace 10 tools with one. Scheduling, payments, community, AI — all in Mgic.

hero.subtitle: The app your members love, the panel you need to run the place, and a dashboard of their own for your coaches. Built for boutique studios that don't settle.

members.label: For your members
members.description: A branded PWA — no App Store required. Booking takes seconds, wrapped in a social-network-style community with milestones, levels and gamification that turn every class into a reason to come back.
features: Simple booking with spot selection and waitlist
Social network: feed, kudos, comments and friends

studio.label: For the owner
studio.description: Schedule classes, get paid without chasing anyone, and understand your business at a glance. Meet Spark, your AI working as COO, CMO, CRO and CFO at once: daily briefings, churn prediction and revenue forecasting.
features: Live metrics: revenue, occupancy and churn
Spark: AI acting as COO, CMO, CRO and CFO in one
Staff payroll and expenses, client check-in

coaches.label: For your coaches
coaches.description: Every coach gets their own dashboard: see who's attending each class, their regular clients, manage their availability, request substitutions and review their earnings.
features: Their schedule and who's attending each class

support.label: Premium support
support.subtitle: We migrate your data, train your team and stay with you with real humans — before, during and after.

cards.title: Built by studio people
cards.desc: We build Mgic Studio alongside studios like yours and ship improvements every week.

cards.title: Stress-free migration
cards.desc: We move your business to Mgic Studio overnight — zero downtime, zero disruption.

cards.title: Support that's real
cards.desc: Video calls with product experts whenever you and your team need them.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: All plans include updates, hosting, and support.
pricing.footerNote: All plans include updates, hosting, and support. No hidden fees.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For new studios getting off the ground.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: For studios ready to scale and retain.
plans.highlight: Spark, your studio AI, is included. Momence charges $399/mo for the equivalent add-on.

contact.label: Contact
contact.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll reach out with a demo. Takes less than a minute.

form.name: Your name
form.successBody: We got your details and will be in touch very soon.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one platform for boutique fitness studios.

onDemand.title: On-Demand classes
onDemand.subtitle: Watch pre-recorded classes whenever you want
onDemand.unlockSubtitle: Subscribe to access the full library
onDemand.subscribeDesc: Unlimited access to the video library
onDemand.subscribeSuccessDesc: You can now watch every video
onDemand.lockedDesc: Subscribe to On-Demand to watch this video
onDemand.notAvailableDesc: This studio doesn't offer On-Demand classes yet
onDemand.emptyDesc: Pre-recorded classes will appear here soon
onDemand.manageSubtitle: Manage your subscription and access the catalog
onDemand.confirmCancel: Cancel your subscription at the end of the period?
onDemand.noSubscriptionDesc: Subscribe to watch On-Demand classes anytime

decoy.title: Featured packages · decoy effect
decoy.description: Shows 3 hand-picked packages (with one preferred) in the booking flow + /packages; the rest go behind “see more”. Off → the full list shows as today.
decoy.explainer: Pick 3 options: a cheap anchor (gets a foot in the door), your target ⭐ (the one you want to push), and a decoy that costs ≥ the target but offers less — so the target becomes the obvious choice. Build the sets and save; then turn it on with the switch above. “Suggest with Spark” builds it for you.
decoy.firstTimerHint: For someone who has never bought. Goal: get them back.
decoy.returningHint: For someone who has bought before. Goal: subscription / bigger pack.
decoy.preferredHint: = preferred (“Recommended” badge). Order 1→3 is what the client sees.
decoy.statusReady: Save, then turn it on with the switch above.
decoy.statusEmpty: Configure at least one set to enable it.
decoy.bannerTitle: Feature packages with the decoy effect
decoy.bannerSubtitle: Curate 3 options (with one preferred) for first-timers and returning clients — Spark validates and suggests the best set.
decoy.checkAtLeastTwo: Choose at least 2 (3 for the full effect).
decoy.checkMarkPreferred: Mark your preferred (⭐) — the one you want to push.
decoy.checkHasDecoy: Decoy: {decoy} costs ≥ but offers less → makes {target} the obvious pick.
decoy.checkNoDecoy: Missing a decoy: an option that costs ≥ your preferred but offers less (worse price/class or fewer classes). Without it the effect doesn't push.
decoy.checkNoAnchor: {target} is the cheapest → it's an anchor, not a target. Consider pushing a mid-value one.
decoy.checkBetterValue: {name} is better value than your preferred — clients might pick it instead.
decoy.checkLimitedTarget: {name} has a purchase limit — a returning client who already bought it sees the next option. For returning clients, a limit-free target (e.g. a subscription) is ideal.
decoy.checkLimitedOthers: {names} {count, plural, one {has} other {have}} a purchase limit — clients who already bought it see the next option.
